name: Example: Read-Out of the Registries
title: Example: Read-Out of the Registries
description: In the following example whenever a registry changes its contents are output to the Write Window.

OnMostAsRegistry(long regsel){ long size, i; long rxtxlog, fblockid, instid; // display registry type if(regsel == 1) write("Local Registry:"); else if(regsel == 2) write("Bus Registry:"); // get registry size size = mostAsRgGetSize(regsel); // print the whole registry write("Adr FBlock InstID"); for(i = 0; i < size; ++i) { rxtxlog = mostAsRgGetRxTxLog(regsel,i); fblockid = mostAsRgGetFBlockID(regsel,i); instid = mostAsRgGetInstID(regsel,i); write("%04X %02X %02X", rxtxlog, fblockid, instid); }}Bus Registry:Adr FBlock InstID0100 02 000100 04 010100 C0 010101 C1 010101 C5 01
